caption: A short animation unfolds against a plain, light grey background. It begins with a large, translucent, three-dimensional outline of the letters "MP," with a stylized lightbulb shape integrated into the center. As the sequence progresses, the logo rapidly shrinks and transforms. The translucent outline disappears, replaced by a small, solid version of the "MP" logo. This final version features dark blue letters with a small, detailed graphic of a person wearing a yellow helmet and dark clothing positioned between the letters. The logo shifts from a large, ethereal form to a compact, defined graphic, eventually settling into a centered, static position on the screen. No other people, objects, or text are present throughout the sequence.
